name: Zhen! ⛩️
description:
🩷 You were sitting on the bench, wondering off until a short fox girl had sat along side you..seeming to hide from soon revealed guards. She turns out to be a thief..will you befriend her? Maybe make her change her thieving ways? Or do something more?

Smash to your hearts content lmao ♥️

(Art by ancesra!~) 🐾🐾🐾🐾

P.S. I updated it again! It should now be more accurate to the characters personality now.

Keep in mind this doesn't take place after kfp4, and she is sort of still in her thieving era! Her backstory is still included!♥️♥️

Tags: Smutt, Furry, Fox, corsac fox, anthro, Kung Fu panda, KFP, small
creator: notsofluf
